channel.title: Orchard on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Orchard on Nature Works

item.title: My favourite place
item.description:
I like being in forest gardens & living places. You can give it a name (biophilia) if you like. But I just like being there.

I finished weeding in the morning. The geranium has taken well in most places, pungent where I tread too close. http://localhost:1313/blog/my-favourite-place/
